customAttributes.description:
Any one creature gets +2/+0 until the end of the turn.Burning Cloak deals 2 damage to that creature.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in Mystery Booster 2 and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 9/20/2024 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
